response.justification: The candidate has approximately 17 years of broad software engineering experience and demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through open-source platform work, but falls well short of the role's core requirements. The position demands recognized AI expertise and the ability to drive AI strategy at a director-level IC scope; the candidate's only AI-related work is recent (2025) infrastructure tooling around MCP and agentic frameworks, with no shipped AI products, no ML background, and no history of advising strategic customers or partners. Cloud platform expertise is similarly thin — a single mention of AWS CDK in a product engineering context does not constitute cloud strategy fluency. The overall seniority profile reflects a strong senior individual contributor, not a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: ~17 years of professional software engineering experience across diverse stacks (web, mobile, embedded, systems), meeting the minimum tenure requirement
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates sustained entrepreneurial initiative, open-source platform ownership, and community contribution (FOSS4G talk, workshops)
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, indicating active engagement with emerging agentic workflows
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized expertise — AI involvement is limited to recent (2025) developer-tooling infrastructure with no shipped AI products, research output, or advisory track record
Cloud platform experience is minimal — AWS CDK in a product engineering context is the only cloud reference; no cloud architecture, cloud strategy, or large-scale infrastructure design is evidenced

Current seniority and scope (Senior/Staff Software Developer, individual contributor) is substantially below the Director-level IC profile required; no evidence of cross-organizational technical leadership, strategic customer engagement, or executive-level influence
